annexure_reference: Annexure A: Rynette to Bantjes — Initial SARS query about two big intercompany invoices (5 Jun 2025)
pipeline: Neon DB → Graph API body/attachment sync → EML generation → Transport header fetch

envelope.subject: SARS query re the two big inter company invoices at the end of February 2025

body.preview:
Hi Danie

Anton forwarded the letter via WhatsApp to Pete’s phone.

I do not know where this letter was sent to, but it is not on my Efiling portal, and it did not come to any of our emails.

This seems to be questions re the two big inter company i

chain_of_custody.extraction_method: Microsoft Graph API v1.0 (client credentials flow)
chain_of_custody.verification: SPF/DKIM/DMARC authentication via internet message headers
chain_of_custody.integrity: SHA-256 hash of generated EML file
